title: Simple CPS
description: A very simple mod to display how much cps you're getting!
body:
### How to Install:

1. Download the mod.
2. Place it in your `mods` folder.
3. Launch the game.
4. Join a server (or Single player)
5. Press right shift
6. Enjoy!
---
### Don't have your version?
- Check out [MovableCps](https://modrinth.com/mod/movablecps) using MovableHud
---
### What does the mod do?
* Displays your cps on a Hud Element.
* Easily movable via the Dynamic HUD editor!
* Accurately measures your cps!
---

### Dependencies:
* [Dynamic HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamichud)
